---
title: ' '
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-inner">
    <p class="page-header-eyebrow">LETR Lab</p>
    <h1 class="page-header-title">Publications</h1>
    <p class="page-header-subtitle">Journal articles and preprints from the lab.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-content">

  <!-- Preprint -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">Preprints &amp; Working Papers</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, &amp; <strong>King, K.</strong></div>
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://osf.io/preprints/psyarxiv/7v3zr_v1" target="_blank">College students' reading and digital listening habits: A survey study.</a></div>
      <div class="pub-venue">PsyArXiv. https://doi.org/10.31234/osf.io/7v3zr_v1</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag pub-tag-in-press">Preprint</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, &amp; Yadav, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Data storytelling intervention to promote climate change and justice awareness and attitudes in college students.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Working paper.</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag pub-tag-in-press">Working Paper</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- 2026 -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2026</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong></div>
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0361476X2600041X" target="_blank">Text comprehension across print and audio: A person-centered mixed methods study of learner profiles.</a></div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Contemporary Educational Psychology.</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag">Journal Article</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- 2025 -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2025</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, Sun, Y., Alexander, P. A., &amp; Zhao, H.</div>
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/psychology/articles/10.3389/fpsyg.2025.1560088/full" target="_blank">Componential modeling of argumentative essay writing from multiple online sources: A Bayesian network approach.</a></div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Frontiers in Psychology.</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag">Journal Article</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- 2023 -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2023</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Alexander, P. A., et al. (incl. <strong>Singh, A.</strong>)</div>
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/369239392_Confronting_the_Challenges_of_Undergraduates'_Argumentation_Writing_in_a_Learning_How_to_Learn_Course" target="_blank">Undergraduate argumentation challenges within a "Learning How to Learn" course.</a></div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Written Communication.</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag">Journal Article</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- 2022 -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2022</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, &amp; Alexander, P. A.</div>
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10648-021-09653-2" target="_blank">Audiobooks, print and comprehension: What we know, what we don't, and what we need to find out.</a></div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Educational Psychology Review.</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag">Journal Article</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, et al.</div>
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11145-021-10241-7" target="_blank">How romanized orthography influences Hindi-English bilingual word recognition.</a></div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Reading and Writing.</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag">Journal Article</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- 2021 -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2021</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Bharaj, P., &amp; <strong>Singh, A.</strong></div>
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/education/articles/10.3389/feduc.2021.727494/full" target="_blank">Educational stakeholder experiences during COVID-19.</a></div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Frontiers in Education.</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag">Journal Article</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- 2019 chapter -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2019</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Alexander, P. A., &amp; The Disciplined Reading and Learning Research Lab (incl. <strong>Singh, A.</strong>)</div>
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.4324/9780429443961-26" target="_blank">Relational reasoning: The bedrock of integration within multi-representational texts, contexts, and perspectives.</a></div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In D. Lombardi, P. van Meter, A. List, &amp; P. Kendeou (Eds.), <em>Handbook of learning from multiple representations and perspectives</em> (pp. 401–424). Routledge.</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag">Chapter</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- 2018 chapter -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2018</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Lin, C., Wang, M., &amp; <strong>Singh, A.</strong></div>
      <div class="pub-title">Introduction to script processing in Chinese and cognitive consequences for bilingual reading.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In H. Pae (Ed.), <em>Writing systems, reading processes, and cross-linguistic influences: Reflections from the Chinese, Japanese, and Korean Languages</em> (pp. 25–48). John Benjamins.</div>
      <div class="pub-tags">
        <span class="pub-tag">Chapter</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <hr class="section-divider">

  <p class="section-label">Presentations</p>
  <h2 class="section-heading">Selected Conference Presentations</h2>
  <p class="section-subheading" style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">* denotes student author</p>

  <!-- 2026 presentations -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2026</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, &amp; Javadizadeh, B.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Mental health in pre-tenure faculty: Identity, mindset, and self-beliefs [Poster accepted for presentation].</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">American Psychological Association Annual Convention, Washington, DC, United States. (August 6–8)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>King, K.*</strong>, &amp; <strong>Singh, A.</strong></div>
      <div class="pub-title">Reading by ear or eye: Examining comprehension, self-efficacy, and reading habits across audio and print [Poster presentation].</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Educational Research Association, Los Angeles, CA, United States. (April 8–12)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 2025 presentations -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2025</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Mattioda, S.*</strong>, <strong>Singh, A.</strong>, &amp; <strong>King, K.*</strong></div>
      <div class="pub-title">Transforming knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs: The impact of a climate justice intervention. Conference roundtable presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">European Association for Research on Learning and Instruction, Graz, Austria. (August 25–29)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 2024 presentations -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2024</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong></div>
      <div class="pub-title">Mixed methods exploration of text processing in print and audio. Poster presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Psychological Association, Seattle, WA, United States. (August 8–10)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 2023 presentations -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2023</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Zhao, H.Z., Sayers, R., <strong>Singh, A.</strong>, &amp; Chow, J.C.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Empirically based mean effect size distributions for writing interventions. Poster presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Psychological Association, Washington, DC, United States. (August 3–5)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, &amp; Alexander, P.A.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Text comprehension across print and audio: A person-centered study. Poster presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Educational Research Association, Virtual. (May 4–5)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Schoute, E.C., van Meerten, J.E., Sun, Y., &amp; <strong>Singh, A.</strong></div>
      <div class="pub-title">Validating students' behavioral profiles in classroom-based multiple source use tasks: Lessons learned, remaining challenges. Paper presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Educational Research Association, Chicago, United States. (April 13–16)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 2022 presentations -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2022</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Sayers, R., Chow, J.C., Morse, A.†, <strong>Singh, A.†</strong>, &amp; Burrows-Doerr, M.†</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Drawings of teacher-child relationships for children at risk for language and behavior disorders. Poster presented. (Authors with † equally contributed)</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Psychological Association, Minneapolis, MN, United States. (August)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 2021 presentations -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2021</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, &amp; Alexander, P.A.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Audiobooks, print and comprehension: What we know and what we need to know. Poster presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Educational Research Association, Virtual. (April)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Piety, P.J., <strong>Singh, A.</strong>, Makowski, T., Mir, D., &amp; Balzotti, J.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Textual ecology, collaborative tasks, and genre systems: Using Productive Disciplinary Engagement to teach STEM career awareness and intent. In A. Singh (Chair), Promoting Productive Disciplinary Engagement through textual practices. Symposium presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Educational Research Association, Virtual. (April)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, Liu, C., Naik, R., &amp; Piety, P.J.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Developing effective visualizations to understand and scaffold collaborative textual practices. Poster presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Learning Analytics and Knowledge Conference, Society for Learning Analytics Research, Virtual. (April)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Schoute, E.C., van Meerten, J.E., Sun, Y., &amp; <strong>Singh, A.</strong></div>
      <div class="pub-title">Search logs, argumentative essays, and performance profiles: Positioning multiple source use in a classroom context. In J. Braasch (Chair), Synergy of reading and writing within multiple source tasks: Novel approaches and innovative techniques. Symposium presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Educational Research Association, Virtual. (April) PsychArchives. https://dx.doi.org/10.23668/psycharchives.8170</div>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong> (Co-Chair)</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Educational innovation in times of crisis. Presidential session.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Educational Research Association, Virtual. (April)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 2020 presentations -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2020</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors">Sun, Y., Alexander, P.A., <strong>Singh, A.</strong>, &amp; Zhao, H.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Characterizing college students' multiple source use in an argumentative essay task: A profile analysis. Poster presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Psychological Association, Washington, D.C. (August)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 2019 presentations -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2019</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, Sun, Y., Alexander, P.A., &amp; Zhao, H.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Defining and assessing integration in the context of argumentative essays based on multiple sources. In L. M. S. Trakhman (Chair), Integration: A critical competency for the digital age. Symposium presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the American Educational Research Association, Toronto, Canada. (April)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 2017 presentations -->
  <div class="pub-year-group">
    <div class="pub-year-header">2017</div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Singh, A.</strong>, Wang, M., &amp; Faroqi-Shah, Y.</div>
      <div class="pub-title">Cross-language phonological priming in different scripts: Hindi-English bilinguals. Poster presented.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Annual meeting of the Society for the Scientific Study of Reading conference, Halifax, Canada. (July)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
